ollama.name: Vercel AI SDK
ollama.note: One of the fastest-moving toolchains for frontend and full-stack AI apps, and a good signal for how the application layer is evolving.

langchain.name: Zed
langchain.note: A high-performance collaborative editor that keeps gaining relevance around AI coding and multiplayer development workflows.

promptfoo.name: uv
promptfoo.note: Astral’s Python toolchain has quickly become core infrastructure for modern Python workflows, not just a faster package manager.

huggingface.name: vLLM
huggingface.note: A critical open-source layer for high-throughput LLM inference, especially for teams pushing on cost and deployment efficiency.
